title: Coordinate machinery and equipment maintenance and repair
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Coordinate machinery and equipment maintenance and repair demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for maintenance and repair work

pcs.text: Clarify requirements of the work responsibilities with the supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify requirements of the work responsibilities with the supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify requirements of the work responsibilities with the supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify equipment and material resource requirements according to the scope of the coordination work and supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify equipment and material resource requirements according to the scope of the coordination work and supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify equipment and material resource requirements according to the scope of the coordination work and supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Identify, document and present the priorities for maintenance and repair activities and time allocation to the supervisor for verification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, document and present the priorities for maintenance and repair activities and time allocation to the supervisor for verification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, document and present the priorities for maintenance and repair activities and time allocation to the supervisor for verification.

pcs.text: Identify the environmental implications of the proposed maintenance and repair work and assess and report potential impacts to the supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the environmental implications of the proposed maintenance and repair work and assess and report potential impacts to the supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the environmental implications of the proposed maintenance and repair work and assess and report potential impacts to the supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify workplace hazards, assess risks and implement risk controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace hazards, assess risks and implement risk controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace hazards, assess risks and implement risk controls.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment according to job requirements and task to be undertaken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment according to job requirements and task to be undertaken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment according to job requirements and task to be undertaken.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for maintenance and repair work

elements.title: Coordinate maintenance and repair of machinery and equipment

pcs.text: Purchase, store and use materials to assist in maintenance and repair work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Purchase, store and use materials to assist in maintenance and repair work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Purchase, store and use materials to assist in maintenance and repair work.

pcs.text: Organise delivery of materials to the site according to maintenance requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise delivery of materials to the site according to maintenance requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise delivery of materials to the site according to maintenance requirements.

pcs.text: Organise machinery and equipment required for maintenance and repair to be on site and in good order when they are required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise machinery and equipment required for maintenance and repair to be on site and in good order when they are required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise machinery and equipment required for maintenance and repair to be on site and in good order when they are required.

pcs.text: Identify and organise routine maintenance and repairs of machinery and equipment and facilitate repairs that require specialist attention
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and organise routine maintenance and repairs of machinery and equipment and facilitate repairs that require specialist attention?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and organise routine maintenance and repairs of machinery and equipment and facilitate repairs that require specialist attention.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Coordinate maintenance and repair of machinery and equipment

elements.title: Coordinate and report on maintenance and repair activities

pcs.text: Coordinate staff and resources to suit the maintenance and repair activities and priority of work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Coordinate staff and resources to suit the maintenance and repair activities and priority of work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Coordinate staff and resources to suit the maintenance and repair activities and priority of work.

pcs.text: Inform operators of their responsibilities in respect to operational maintenance requirements of machinery and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inform operators of their responsibilities in respect to operational maintenance requirements of machinery and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inform operators of their responsibilities in respect to operational maintenance requirements of machinery and equipment.

pcs.text: Monitor personnel and document activities, timelines and materials usage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor personnel and document activities, timelines and materials usage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor personnel and document activities, timelines and materials usage.

pcs.text: Recognise and report contingency situations to the supervisor and adjust schedules accordingly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and report contingency situations to the supervisor and adjust schedules accordingly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and report contingency situations to the supervisor and adjust schedules accordingly.

pcs.text: Document and report maintenance and repair activities undertaken and completed to relevant personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and report maintenance and repair activities undertaken and completed to relevant personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and report maintenance and repair activities undertaken and completed to relevant personnel.

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
